parser_claim: 有 predicates possession when an overt possessor subject precedes it.
source_proposition: Examples such as 我有一個仔一個女 and 佢有幾間屋 illustrate possessor + 有 + possessed NP.
implementation_effect: License an overt possessive-have subtype when subject and NP are visible.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the possessor as a locative domain or insert an omitted possessed noun.

parser_claim: 有 predicates existence when a place expression supplies the spatial domain.
source_proposition: Examples corresponding to 香港有好多的士 and 枱上面有幾隻碟 show location/domain + 有 + introduced NP.
implementation_effect: License a locative-existence subtype distinct from possession.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that the initial location is a possessor or a hidden subject.

parser_claim: 有 can introduce an indefinite participant followed by additional predication.
source_proposition: The grammar gives 有(一)個人搵你, 有幾個學生好嬲, and 有好多客人嚟咗 as introduction/presentation patterns.
implementation_effect: Separate participant-introducing/presentational structures from simple possession or location-based existence.
forbidden_inference: Do not assume every 有 + NP + predicate has the runtime locative-coda structure.

parser_claim: Possessive verbal 有 and existential-marker 有 have different overt subject profiles in a linguistically motivated segmentation scheme.
source_proposition: The scheme treats 有 as a verb for possession with an explicit subject and as an existential marker when the introduced noun is the subject and no overt subject is present.
implementation_effect: Preserve an analysis boundary between overt possessor predication and subjectless participant introduction.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert a segmentation annotation into a complete syntactic theory or hidden-subject analysis.

parser_claim: The registered optional-subject template collapses possession and existence under one node.
source_proposition: ExistentialClause is defined as optional subject + 有 + NP with the note existential/possessive clause.
implementation_effect: Split the language claim by possessor, locative domain, and participant-introduction structure before any authorized implementation.
forbidden_inference: Do not reinterpret accepted output or change runtime behavior in R9.

parser_claim: Positive 有 + dynamic VP is an auxiliary/modal profile, not automatically the same as lexical possession or existence.
source_proposition: The study identifies auxiliary/modal 有 + dynamic VP with a distinct distribution, especially in polar questions, conditionals, and negatives.
implementation_effect: Keep NP-complement possession/existence separate from VP-complement auxiliary/event profiles.
forbidden_inference: Do not import uninspected examples or license arbitrary 有 + VP from abstract-level evidence.

parser_claim: 冇 is the irregular negative counterpart of 有 in possessive and existential uses; *唔有 is not the standard form described.
source_proposition: The grammar explicitly identifies 冇 as the negative of 有 and contrasts it with *唔有.
implementation_effect: Preserve 冇 as the overt negative predicate in possession/existence clauses.
forbidden_inference: Do not decompose every 冇 token into an ordinary negator plus hidden 有.

parser_claim: Hong Kong Cantonese uses 冇 in both negative existential and negative possessive constructions.
source_proposition: Lam gives classroom-location + 冇 + pencils and 我 + 冇 + pencils as distinct existential and possessive examples.
implementation_effect: Split locative nonexistence from possessor nonpossession even though both use 冇.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse either subtype with perfective event negation merely because 冇 is shared.

parser_claim: The suppletive 有/冇 relation is independently documented in a formal analysis of Cantonese negation.
source_proposition: Yip treats 有 as having a special suppletive negative 冇 rather than ordinary 唔-prefixation.
implementation_effect: Represent visible suppletion without fabricating an overt positive existential inside negative clauses.
forbidden_inference: Do not adopt the paper’s full lexical-rule architecture as mandatory parser design.

parser_claim: The runtime template optional subject + 冇 + NP conflates negative possession with negative existence.
source_proposition: The same surface marker participates in a broad registered node and a more specific location-domain fallback.
implementation_effect: Retain separate source-linked subtypes and preserve overt location/possessor roles.
forbidden_inference: Do not change accepted nodes in this research-only batch.

parser_claim: 冇 + VP event/perfective negation is not a negative existential NP construction.
source_proposition: Lam separates negative existential/possessive DP complements from perfective predicate negation, despite use of the same form 冇.
implementation_effect: Require an NP-domain versus VP/event distinction before assigning a negative existential clause.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify all 冇-headed spans as existential or possessive.

parser_claim: 有冇 + NP forms possessive polar questions.
source_proposition: Examples ask whether addressees have questions, time, or money using 有冇.
implementation_effect: License an overt possessor + 有冇 + possessed-NP subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer an omitted possessor when none is visible unless discourse evidence is separately recorded.

parser_claim: A locative expression plus 有冇 + NP asks whether something exists in that location.
exact_locator: Unit 6, PDF pp. 40 and 42-43 / printed pp. 28 and 30-31
source_proposition: The grammar contrasts existential 有/冇/有冇 and gives location-based questions such as whether there is anything to eat inside.
implementation_effect: License a locative-existence question subtype with overt domain and NP/availability complement.
forbidden_inference: Do not force the location into possessor or grammatical-subject status.

parser_claim: 有冇 + NP is independently used as an existential-question coding category.
source_proposition: The scheme defines [jau5mou5-NP] and gives 呢度有冇車車呀 as an existential question asking whether something exists.
implementation_effect: Support the overt marker-plus-NP frame without claiming exhaustive adult grammar.
forbidden_inference: Do not use a child-language coding category to license unrelated VP complements or postposed forms.

parser_claim: 有冇 may question availability when an introduced item is followed by a purpose/action predicate.
source_proposition: 入邊有冇嘢食 illustrates existence/availability of something to eat; parallel statements include homework to do and clothes to buy.
implementation_effect: Represent availability as an NP/pivot-like domain with a following predicate, distinct from event-occurrence 有冇 + VP.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat every noun-plus-verb sequence after 有冇 as one opaque lexical NP.

parser_claim: 有冇 + dynamic or experiential VP asks whether an event or experience occurred and is distinct from NP existence.
source_proposition: Hara analyzes Jimmy 有冇付出過時間呀 as an A-not-A polar question over an event/experiential predicate.
implementation_effect: Route VP-complement event questions separately from ExistentialQuestion NP complements.
forbidden_inference: Do not conclude that all 有冇 + VP strings are grammatical or that occurrence questions are literal possession.

parser_claim: The teaching grammar independently distinguishes 有冇 + VP auxiliary questions from possession/existence.
source_proposition: Examples include 有冇搬屋 and 有冇學過普通話, with 有/冇 short answers and aspect-sensitive VP complements.
implementation_effect: Keep event/experiential questions outside the NP existential-question subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that auxiliary 有 has the same argument structure as possessive 有.

parser_claim: The runtime uses one label for overt NP possession/existence, availability, and bare discourse-dependent 有冇, while routing VP complements to other labels.
source_proposition: The fallback distinguishes elliptical domain, event/experiential VP, availability nominal, and overt NP branches, but three branches retain ExistentialQuestion.
implementation_effect: Split overt possession, locative existence, availability, and elliptical-domain representations while preserving the event-routing boundary.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote the existing label as one productive Cantonese construction.

parser_claim: The standard question form is suppletive 有冇, not ordinary exact-copy *有唔有.
source_proposition: The grammar explicitly states that the question form combines 有 and 冇 and contrasts it with *有唔有.
implementation_effect: Represent the overt 有冇 marker as suppletive and preserve its tokenization.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize ordinary V唔V copy rules to 有.

parser_claim: Location/domain + 有 + introduced NP is an attested Cantonese existential order.
source_proposition: Examples place 香港, 呢度, or 枱上面 before 有/冇 and an NP; the text notes that the sentence simply begins with the place expression.
implementation_effect: License an overt spatial-domain subtype with no hidden expletive.
forbidden_inference: Do not automatically label the location as possessor, topic, or canonical subject, and do not insert a hidden expletive.

parser_claim: Location/domain + 冇 + NP is the negative locative-existential counterpart.
source_proposition: 課室/課室度 + 冇 + 鉛筆 is given as a Hong Kong Cantonese negative existential.
implementation_effect: Permit positive and negative polarity under a locative-existential family while keeping the overt markers distinct.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert positive 有 after 冇 or merge this with non-locative possession.

parser_claim: The place expression supplies the existential domain rather than requiring an English-like preposition or expletive.
source_proposition: The reference states that no preposition is needed and the sentence begins with the place expression.
implementation_effect: Preserve the overt location/domain as such and leave subject/topic analysis open unless separately evidenced.
forbidden_inference: Do not fabricate there/expletive material or force one syntactic theory.

parser_claim: The active fallback matches location + 有/冇 + NP, but the registered dormant template describes an unrelated topic/location/都/有 pattern.
source_proposition: The active construction is a locative existential, whereas the dormant registry template does not encode the attested simple location-domain frame.
implementation_effect: Retire or replace the dormant template before any future activation; keep the active form evidence-only in R9.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat a mismatched dormant template as sourced grammar.

parser_claim: Locative existential, possessive, and presentational uses share 有 but differ in argument and information structure.
source_proposition: The segmentation scheme distinguishes possession with explicit subject from existential introduction without overt subject, exemplified by 有個男仔孭我走喇.
implementation_effect: Keep overt-domain existence distinct from possessor predication and participant-first presentation.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer one homogeneous 有 construction from shared spelling.

parser_claim: Cantonese 有 can introduce an indefinite NP that is followed by a predicate.
source_proposition: Examples include 有(一)個人搵你, 有幾個學生好嬲, and 有好多客人嚟咗.
implementation_effect: Recognize a general participant-introducing/presentational family distinct from simple possession.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that the post-NP predicate must be a locative coda or that all variants share one syntax.

parser_claim: A segmentation source treats 有 as an existential marker introducing the following noun when no overt subject is present.
source_proposition: The example 有個男仔孭我走喇 is analyzed with existential-marker 有 and introduced noun as subject of the following predication.
implementation_effect: Preserve visible participant introduction and following predicate boundaries.
forbidden_inference: Do not claim this annotation proves every presentational construction or polarity pattern.

parser_claim: The runtime label is restricted to 有/冇 + NP + a visible 喺/喺度 locative coda.
source_proposition: The fallback builds ExistentialPresentationalClause only when the introduced participant precedes a locative coda.
implementation_effect: Keep this exact branch research-pending until direct construction-level evidence for the NP+locative-coda order is added.
forbidden_inference: Do not use broader 有+NP+predicate examples as proof of this exact coda template.

parser_claim: No inspected primary source in R9 directly established the runtime’s exact positive/negative 有/冇 + NP + 喺-coda construction as one homogeneous node.
exact_locator: R9 source-search log entries R9-S09 and R9-S10
source_proposition: General participant-introducing evidence exists, but the exact locative-coda order and negative counterpart remain unmapped.
implementation_effect: Retain the label under exact-form quarantine; seek corpus and construction-specific analysis.
forbidden_inference: Do not interpret absence of a located source as evidence that speakers reject the form.

parser_claim: 有 and 冇 can serve as short answers to 有冇 questions when the questioned domain is recoverable.
source_proposition: The auxiliary question dialogues answer with 有 or 冇 while optionally repeating parenthetical predicate material.
implementation_effect: License a discourse-dependent short affirmative/negative response without inventing overt domain words.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat a bare answer as a context-free complete possession/existence clause.

parser_claim: The runtime correctly marks bare or subject-bearing 冇 responses as context-required domain ellipsis rather than clean existential clauses.
source_proposition: NegatedExistentialFragment records missing negative_response_domain, unresolved antecedent, and no fabricated domain.
implementation_effect: Retain the explicit context-required status and transparent overt tokens.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert the internal missing-domain record into a syntactic null-object claim.

parser_claim: Runtime extensions allow one focus adverb, an overt subject, repetition of 冇, and selected particles around the short response.
source_proposition: These extensions are parser-governance decisions beyond the minimal externally attested short-answer pattern.
implementation_effect: Keep the extended templates provisional and separately test each discourse pattern with corpus/native evidence.
forbidden_inference: Do not cite general short answers as proof of every focus, repetition, subject, or particle combination.

parser_claim: Bare 冇 can also negate event/perfective predicates in other structures, so fragment classification depends on absence of an overt complement plus discourse context.
source_proposition: 冇 occurs across negative existential, possessive, and perfective-predicate environments.
implementation_effect: Require structural and discourse evidence before assigning the response-fragment subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify every isolated or clause-internal 冇 token as a negated existential fragment.

parser_claim: The registry claims optional subject + 有 + NP + 冇 as a postposed existential/possessive question.
source_proposition: The label exists as an explicit template distinct from the standard adjacent 有冇 marker.
implementation_effect: Keep the exact template visible in the research queue but do not promote it.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer support from the node’s existence or accepted fixtures alone.

parser_claim: The inspected reference grammar documents adjacent 有冇 and explicitly contrasts it with ordinary *有唔有, but does not document 有 + NP + 冇 in the verified section.
source_proposition: The sourced standard polar form is 有冇 before the questioned domain.
implementation_effect: Do not derive the postposed template from the standard suppletive marker by free movement or analogy.
forbidden_inference: Do not claim the reference rejects postposed 有…冇; it simply does not establish it here.

parser_claim: R9 did not locate primary construction-level evidence for the exact postposed 有 + NP + 冇 template.
source_proposition: Searches retrieved standard 有冇 questions, tag questions, and general A-not-A work but no verified exact-form analysis.
implementation_effect: Quarantine the language claim pending corpus attestation and independent research.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat a source-search gap as an ungrammaticality judgment.

parser_claim: Cantonese wh-words occur in situ, and 有 may combine with overt wh material in attested questions.
source_proposition: The scheme lists in-situ wh forms and examples including 做乜有一個橙嘅 and 有幾多架車呀.
implementation_effect: Allow overt 有 plus independently licensed in-situ wh phrases as a broad research domain.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer the runtime’s exact 有 + 咩 + optional NP template from different wh expressions.

parser_claim: The runtime registry and legacy fallback specifically claim 有 + 咩 + optional NP.
source_proposition: Any core containing 有 and 咩 may be wrapped as ExistentialWhQuestion by the legacy fallback, regardless of verified local structure.
implementation_effect: Narrow future recognition to an exact source-backed wh construction with token order and complement boundaries.
forbidden_inference: Do not use mere co-occurrence of 有 and 咩 as construction evidence.

parser_claim: R9 did not locate primary evidence establishing the exact generic 有咩 + NP node or its optional-NP breadth.
source_proposition: General wh-in-situ and 有+quantity/why examples are attested, but the runtime template remains unverified at construction level.
implementation_effect: Keep general components mapped but quarantine the exact template until corpus examples and analysis are linked.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer ungrammaticality or replace 咩 with another wh form.
